posts.author: MossyGarden92
posts.text: The new council plans for Westbridge are absolute nonsense. They want to turn the community allotments into a generic car park and ban us from growing our own veg. It's a complete waste of space that was meant for locals. #Westbridge #CouncilRubbish
posts.explanation: This post expresses lawful criticism of government policy regarding land use, which is permitted content without spreading harmful false claims or threats.

posts.author: OakhavenReader
posts.text: Just saw the update regarding the temporary roadworks on High Street in Oakhaven. The maintenance team will be working between 8am and 5pm starting Monday to resurface the junction near the library entrance. Please plan your journey carefully if you need to pass through during those hours. #communitynews
posts.explanation: This is a benign public notice about local maintenance and transport, not a threat or misinformation.

posts.author: JulesFromMoorvale
posts.text: Hey everyone, I need a hand with my account security! Someone is trying to scam me and I think they have my login details. They said to go through this [link removed] to reset it urgently. Please don't click that link!
posts.explanation: This post is a clear credential-harvesting attempt where the author solicits sensitive data via a suspicious link, requiring immediate removal.

posts.author: MoorvaleMarketUser
posts.text: Just tried to buy a vintage camera from a seller who claimed they were the original owner. They sent me photos of an ID card, but the name on it was different to what I saw in the profile picture. They also asked me to send my 2FA code to 'verify' the transaction before shipping. This looks like a complete fake! #scam #fraud
posts.explanation: The post shows clear signs of social engineering, including impersonation and requests for security codes, which requires specialist verification.

posts.author: BellmereBloomer
posts.text: Exciting news for our community! The annual Westbridge Garden Show is taking place this weekend at the Greenfield Centre. Come along to see the stunning floral displays, visit the local artisan stalls, and enjoy live music from the bandstand. Free entry for all residents! #community #gardenshow
posts.explanation: This post is a harmless announcement about a fictional public event with no policy violations, so it should be approved.

posts.author: MoorvalePaws
posts.text: Our neighbour's golden retriever, Buster, decided to join the morning commute today! He trotted right up to my car as I was leaving and just wouldn't stop wagging his tail. Had to give him a treat before he could get back to his owner. #puppylove #morningchaos
posts.explanation: This is a harmless, light-hearted post about a pet and everyday mishap. It does not label itself as a threat, scam, or misinformation violation.

posts.author: LunaPots
posts.text: Just finished re-potting my fiddle leaf fig! The new terracotta pot is perfect and the soil was well-drained. It's so satisfying to see it perk up after a bit of repotting. #plantmom #houseplants
posts.explanation: This post describes a harmless gardening activity and uses only fictional or generic terms; it contains no evidence of policy violations.

posts.author: ElaraMoss
posts.text: Honestly, my boss is having a laugh at my expense today. He kept asking why I didn't finish the report by 5pm, and then he told me that if I wanted the promotion I should just work weekends like him. It's absolutely ridiculous, but I'm not letting it get to me. #worklife
posts.explanation: This post shares mild workplace frustration and humour without promoting harm, soliciting private information, or indicating a safety threat, making it appropriate for approval.

posts.author: HonestObserver72
posts.text: Really disappointed in how some people treat others on this app. Saw a post earlier where someone was being genuinely rude and dismissive, and the pile-on was getting toxic. I just wanted to call it out because constructive feedback is important but personal attacks aren't. We need to keep things civil for everyone's sake.
posts.explanation: The post calmly reports rude behaviour without directing a pile-on or revealing private information, making it an acceptable user contribution rather than a policy violation.
